## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change, mapped to one issue
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` clean and `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes; new behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Commits are signed off (DCO `Signed-off-by`)
- [ ] ADR added/updated if a non-obvious decision was made
